name: Daily Delivery Health Check - Crebos Pilot

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ { contents: [ { parts: [ { text: "You are a project health analyst. Analyze this project and provide actionable insights in JSON format ONLY.

Project: " + $json.projectName + "
Completion: " + $json.completion + "%
Overdue Tasks: " + $json.overdue + "
Blockers: " + ($json.blockers || "None") + "
My Assessment: Status is " + $json.systemStatus + " with score " + $json.score + "/100

RESPOND WITH ONLY THIS JSON (no markdown, no extra text):
{
  "aiStatus": "RED" or "YELLOW" or "GREEN",
  "isValid": true or false,
  "keyIssues": "2-3 key problems (2 sentences max)",
  "risks": "What happens if not fixed (2 sentences max)",
  "recommendedActions": "Specific next steps (2-3 actions)"
}

Rules:
- aiStatus should match my assessment (" + $json.systemStatus + ")
- isValid: true if you agree, false if you see different issues
- Be concise and actionable
- Return ONLY valid JSON, nothing else" } ] } ], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.3, maxOutputTokens: 1024 } } }}

parameters.subject: =🚨 ACTION REQUIRED: {{ $json.manualReviewCount }} Project(s) Flagged for Manual Review
={{ $json.statusAlertCount }} Project Health Alert(s) Detected

nodes.name: Set a custom Field on a task

main.node: Set a custom Field on a task
